title: chrysocoma oblongifolia
intro: Chrysocoma oblongifolia, also known as the round-leaved chrysanthemum or round-leaved chamomile, is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Chrysocoma oblongifolia include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as its use as a digestive aid and to reduce stress and anxiety. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
